experience.title: Fullstack Software Engineer
bullets: Designing microservices and data models for a Google Android Management API-based MDM that now manages 300K+ devices.
Built ingestion pipelines and structured logging that capture 1M+ telemetry data points per day with DataDog-backed monitoring.
Own core technical decisions, code reviews, and deployment playbooks to keep global device fleets healthy.

experience.title: Software Development Engineer
bullets: Delivered maker-checker workflows and compliance features for Barclays, Validus, and other asset-management clients.
Implemented granular audit logging so portfolio actions and configuration changes are reviewable months later.
Collaborated with PMs, designers, and client teams to launch financial calculation modules such as XIRR.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Founding team)
bullets: Launched a serverless marketing analytics SaaS that generated dynamic campaign reports on demand.
Led a small dev pod, partnering directly with the founder to ship features under aggressive timelines.
Implemented pixel-perfect UI flows with designers while keeping infra costs lean.

projects.name: OCPP Task Manager
projects.description: Transport-layer agnostic Node.js framework for building EV charge point simulators and CSMS backends.
highlights: Hookable lifecycle for CALL / CALLRESULT / CALLERROR flows
Used by teams prototyping hardware and validating backend workflows

projects.name: OCPP Central System Boilerplate
projects.description: Ready-to-run CSMS starter that lets companies bootstrap OCPP integrations quickly.
highlights: Opinionated structure for sessions, routing, and device state
Pairs with Task Manager to simulate large charger fleets

projects.name: node-bifrost
projects.description: Role + scope-based access control layer for Node.js SaaS apps backed by MongoDB.
highlights: Declarative ACLs, wildcard scopes, and audit-friendly assignments
Ships as an npm module powering internal SaaS tooling
